Inventory Management System Test Sequence (Gas Products)

Note: Replace {{placeholders}} with real IDs from prior responses.
Base URL: http://localhost:8012 (adjust for your gateway/service setup)
Headers: Content-Type: application/json

1) Create product categories
   - POST /api/v1/system/product-category/create
   - Files: product-category-create-1.json, product-category-create-2.json
   - curl examples:
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/product-category/create" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @product-category-create-1.json
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/product-category/create" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @product-category-create-2.json

2) Create product subcategories
   - POST /api/v1/system/product-sub-category/create
   - Files: product-subcategory-create-1.json, product-subcategory-create-2.json
   - curl examples:
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/product-sub-category/create" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @product-subcategory-create-1.json
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/product-sub-category/create" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @product-subcategory-create-2.json

3) Create 5 gas products (multipart/form-data if attaching files)
   - POST /api/v1/system/product/create
   - Files: product-create-1.json ... product-create-5.json
   - curl example (JSON only fields; add -F imageUpload=@file if needed):
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/product/create" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @product-create-1.json

4) Create warehouse location
   - POST /api/v1/system/warehouse-locations/create
   - File: warehouse-location-create.json
   - curl example:
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/warehouse-locations/create" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @warehouse-location-create.json

5) Create inventory items or initial stock (choose one path)
   - Inventory items: POST /api/v1/system/inventory-item/create
     - Files: inventory-item-create-1.json ... inventory-item-create-5.json
     - curl example:
       curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/inventory-item/create" \
         -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
         -d @inventory-item-create-1.json
   - Initial stock (optional alternative): POST /api/v1/system/inventory-item/initial-stock

6) Create purchase requisition
   - POST /api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/create
   - File: purchase-requisition-create.json
   - curl example:
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/create" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @purchase-requisition-create.json

7) Submit purchase requisition
   - POST /api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/submit/{id}?submittedByUserId=22
   - curl example:
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/submit/{{purchaseRequisitionId}}?submittedByUserId=22"

8) Approve purchase requisition
   - POST /api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/approve
   - File: purchase-requisition-approve.json
   - curl example:
     curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/approve" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -d @purchase-requisition-approve.json

9) Create PO from PR (or direct PO)
   - From PR: POST /api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/create-po
     - File: purchase-requisition-create-po.json
     - curl example:
       curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/purchase-requisition/create-po" \
         -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
         -d @purchase-requisition-create-po.json
   - Direct PO: POST /api/v1/system/purchase-order/create
     - File: purchase-order-create.json
     - curl example:
       curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/purchase-order/create" \
         -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
         -d @purchase-order-create.json

10) Create sales order and lines
    - POST /api/v1/system/sales-order/create
      - File: sales-order-create.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/sales-order/create" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @sales-order-create.json
    - Optional line add: POST /api/v1/system/sales-order-line/create
      - File: sales-order-line-create.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/sales-order-line/create" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @sales-order-line-create.json

11) Reserve inventory and check availability
    - Reserve: POST /api/v1/system/inventory-allocations/reserve
      - File: inventory-allocation-reserve.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/inventory-allocations/reserve" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @inventory-allocation-reserve.json
    - Availability: POST /api/v1/system/inventory-allocations/availability
      - File: inventory-availability.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/inventory-allocations/availability" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @inventory-availability.json

12) Fulfill sales order after delivery
    - PUT /api/v1/system/sales-order/fulfill
    - File: sales-order-fulfill.json
    - curl example:
      curl -X PUT "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/sales-order/fulfill" \
        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
        -d @sales-order-fulfill.json

13) Optional operational steps
    - Stock adjustment: POST /api/v1/system/stock-adjustment/create
      - File: stock-adjustment-create.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/stock-adjustment/create" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @stock-adjustment-create.json
    - Inventory transfer: POST /api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/create
      - File: inventory-transfer-create.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/create" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @inventory-transfer-create.json
    - Transfer approve: POST /api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/approve
      - File: inventory-transfer-approve.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/approve" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @inventory-transfer-approve.json
    - Transfer start transit: POST /api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/start-transit
      - File: inventory-transfer-start-transit.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/start-transit" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @inventory-transfer-start-transit.json
    - Transfer complete: POST /api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/complete
      - File: inventory-transfer-complete.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/inventory-transfer/complete" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @inventory-transfer-complete.json
    - Purchase return: POST /api/v1/system/purchase-return/create
      - File: purchase-return-create.json
      - curl example:
        curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/purchase-return/create" \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d @purchase-return-create.json

14) Receive goods (GRV) last
    - POST /api/v1/system/purchase-orders/{purchaseOrderId}/receive
    - File: goods-receipt-receive.json
    - curl example:
      curl -X POST "$BASE_URL/api/v1/system/purchase-orders/{{purchaseOrderId}}/receive" \
        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
        -d @goods-receipt-receive.json

15) Verify in DB
    - File: verify_inventory_cycle.sql
